# programs.lf

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by scripts/nix-options.sh. Do not edit by hand. -->

All options under `programs.lf`.

| Option | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `programs.lf.cmdKeybindings` | `attribute set of (null or string)` | Keys to bind to command line commands which can only be one of the builtin commands. Keys set to null or an empty string are deleted. |
| `programs.lf.commands` | `attribute set of (null or string)` | Commands to declare. Commands set to null or an empty string are deleted. |
| `programs.lf.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable lf. |
| `programs.lf.extraConfig` | `strings concatenated with “\n”` | Custom lfrc lines. |
| `programs.lf.keybindings` | `attribute set of (null or string)` | Keys to bind. Keys set to null or an empty string are deleted. |
| `programs.lf.package` | `package` | The lf package to use. |
| `programs.lf.previewer.keybinding` | `null or string` | Key to bind to the script at previewer.source and pipe through less. Setting to null will not bind any key. |
| `programs.lf.previewer.source` | `null or absolute path` | Script or executable to use to preview files. Sets lf’s previewer option. |
| `programs.lf.settings` | `attribute set of (string or signed integer or list of (string or signed integer) or boolean)` | An attribute set of lf settings. See the lf documentation for detailed descriptions of these options. Prefer programs.lf.previewer.\* for setting lf’s previewer option. All string options are quoted with double quotes. |
